parameters.query:
SELECT r.rolname AS username
FROM pg_roles r
WHERE has_database_privilege(r.rolname, 'postgres', 'CONNECT')
  AND r.rolname NOT IN (
    'pg_database_owner',
    'pg_read_all_data', 
    'pg_write_all_data',
    'pg_monitor',
    'qt-',
    'myuser',
    'pg_signal_backend',
    'slo-postgres-readonly',
    'postgres-readonly',
    'migration',
    'pg_read_all_settings',
    'pg_read_all_stats',
    'pg_stat_scan_tables'
  )
  AND r.rolname NOT LIKE 'pg_%'  -- Exclude all pg_* system roles
ORDER BY r.rolname;

parameters.subject: N8N Database & Secret Rotation Workflow
parameters.html:
=

✅ Database - Password Rotation Complete

Hello,

The database password has been successfully rotated for:

Username: {{$json.username}}

New Password: {{$json.newPassword}}

Deployment: {{$json.deploymentName}}

Rotation Time: {{$json.timestamp}}

Actions Completed:

  • ✅ PostgreSQL user password updated
  • ✅ Kubernetes secret updated (db-credentials)
  • ✅ Deployment restarted ({{$json.deploymentName}})

⚠️ Important: Please update any applications or services that use these credentials.

This is an automated security notification from n8n workflow.

Database & Secret Rotation Workflow | n8n Automation

parameters.subject: N8N ⚠️ FAILURE: Database Password Rotation Failed - {{$json.username}}
parameters.html:
=

⚠️ DATABASE PASSWORD ROTATION FAILED

❌ ERROR! The password rotation workflow encountered a critical failure.

❌ Failed Step: {{$json.failedStep || 'Kubernetes Secret Update'}}

⚠️ Error Message: {{$json.errorMessage || 'Deployment not found - Kubernetes secret could not be updated'}}

📅 Failure Time: {{$json.timestamp}}

✅ PARTIAL SUCCESS: The PostgreSQL database password WAS updated successfully!

However, the Kubernetes secret update failed.

👤 Username: {{$json.username}}

🔑 NEW Password (IMPORTANT - Save this):

{{$json.newPassword}}

🚀 Deployment: {{$json.deploymentName || 'Unknown'}}

⚠️ IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED:

The database password has been changed, but the Kubernetes secret was NOT updated. This means:

  • ✅ Database password is updated
  • ❌ Applications using Kubernetes secrets will NOT work with the new password
  • ❌ Deployments will fail to connect to the database

🔧 Manual Fix Steps:

# 1. Update the Kubernetes secret with the new password
kubectl patch secret db-credentials -n default -p '{"data":{"password":"'$(echo -n "{{$json.newPassword}}" | base64)'"}}'

# 2. Verify the secret was updated
kubectl get secret db-credentials -n default -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 --decode
echo ""

# 3. Restart the deployment to pick up the new secret
kubectl rollout restart deployment/db-test-deployment -n default

# 4. Check pod status
kubectl get pods -n default -w

📋 Verification Commands:

# Check current secret password
kubectl get secret db-credentials -n default -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 --decode && echo ""

# Check if pods are using the new secret
kubectl get pods -n default -o json | jq '.items[].spec.containers[].env[] | select(.name=="DB_PASSWORD")'

This is an automated failure alert from n8n Database & Secret Rotation Workflow.

⚠️ Manual intervention is required to complete the rotation process.

n8n Automation | Password Rotation System - Manual Action Required

parameters.subject: N8N ⚠️ FAILURE: Database Password Rotation Failed - {{$json.username}}
N8N ⚠️ CRITICAL: Secret Not Found - {{$json.username}} - Password Rotation Stopped
N8N ⚠️ FAILURE: PostgreSQL Password Update Failed - {{$json.username}}
parameters.html:
=

⚠️ PostgreSQL Password Update Failed

Username: {{$json.username}}

New Password: {{$json.newPassword}}

❌ Error: {{$json.errorMessage}}
Time: {{$json.formattedTime}}
Status Code: {{$json.statusCode}}

🔧 Manual Fix:

psql -U postgres -d your_database
ALTER USER "{{$json.username}}" WITH PASSWORD '{{$json.newPassword}}';

parameters.subject: N8N ⚠️ FAILURE: Database Password Rotation Failed - {{$json.username}}
